beats.label: Request
beats.detail: The viewer asks the sandboxed iframe for the artifact.
beats.narration: A request leaves the viewer for the artifact it wants to show.

beats.label: Resolve
beats.detail: The artifact:// handler maps the URL to a file on disk.
beats.narration: The custom-scheme handler resolves that URL to a file on disk.

beats.label: Read
beats.detail: The Rust core reads the bytes, never touching the network.
beats.narration: The Rust core reads the bytes locally, never touching the network.

beats.label: Stamp
beats.detail: The response is stamped with its Content-Security-Policy.
beats.narration: On the way back, the response is stamped with its Content-Security-Policy.

beats.label: Render
beats.detail: The iframe renders the artifact inside those per-response walls.
beats.narration: The iframe renders the artifact inside those per-response walls.
